title: Grilled Chicken
recipe_body: Season chicken breast. Grill 6-8 minutes per side.

title: Butternut Squash and Sage Wontons
recipe_body: 6 large garlic cloves, unpeeled. 4 sage leaves (2 whole, 2 minced). 2 T plus 1 t olive oil. Arrange garlic and sage on foil, drizzle with oil, wrap and roast 40 minutes at 400. Peel garlic. Toast walnuts 5 minutes, chop. Simmer squash in water 15 minutes, drain, mash with garlic and sage. Sauté shallot and minced sage 3 minutes. Mix everything with salt and pepper. Fill wontons, fold into triangles. Steam 5 minutes. Fry until crispy.

title: Beef Stew
recipe_body: Brown beef chunks. Add vegetables and broth. Simmer 90 minutes.

title: Baked Salmon
recipe_body: Season salmon fillet. Bake at 400 for 12-15 minutes.

title: Tofu Stir Fry
recipe_body: Press tofu, cube. Stir fry with vegetables and soy sauce.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipe_body: Mix butter, sugar, eggs. Add flour, chocolate chips. Bake 10 minutes at 350.

title: Vanilla Cake
recipe_body: Cream butter and sugar. Add eggs, vanilla. Mix in flour. Bake 30 minutes.

title: Strawberry Ice Cream
recipe_body: Heat cream and sugar. Cool. Add strawberries. Churn in ice cream maker.

title: Apple Pie
recipe_body: Make pie crust. Slice apples, toss with sugar and cinnamon. Fill crust, bake 50 minutes.

title: Steamed Pork Buns
recipe_body: Marinate pork strips in honey, oyster sauce, hoisin, soy, rice wine, five spice. Chill overnight. Roast at 450 for 30-40 minutes, basting frequently. Broil 2 minutes until charred. Make sauce with broth, oyster sauce, ketchup, sugar, cornstarch. Stir fry onion, add chopped pork, wine, and sauce. For dough: mix flour, sugar, baking powder, milk, oil. Knead 12 minutes, rest 1 hour. Divide into 16 balls, shape into cups, fill with pork mixture. Steam 15-20 minutes.

title: Margarita
recipe_body: Mix tequila, lime juice, triple sec. Serve over ice.

title: Green Smoothie
recipe_body: Blend spinach, banana, almond milk.

title: Guacamole
recipe_body: Mash avocados. Mix in lime, cilantro, onion, tomato.

title: Scrambled Eggs
recipe_body: Beat eggs. Cook in butter, stirring.

title: Pancakes
recipe_body: Mix flour, milk, eggs. Cook on griddle.

title: Roasted Vegetables
recipe_body: Toss vegetables with olive oil. Roast at 425 for 30 minutes.

title: Garlic Mashed Potatoes
recipe_body: Boil potatoes. Mash with butter, garlic, cream.

title: Caesar Salad
recipe_body: Toss romaine with dressing, croutons, parmesan.

title: BBQ Sauce
recipe_body: Simmer ketchup, vinegar, brown sugar, spices for 45 minutes.

title: Curry Powder
recipe_body: Mix spices.
